otherRequirements: Visa-free entry for tourism or business for up to 30 days; you can apply to extend your stay once in the Philippines
Register on the eTravel system and obtain a QR code within 72 hours before arrival (free of charge)
You must be able to show proof of return or onward travel
sourceNote: gov.uk Philippines travel advice — visa-free for tourism or business up to 30 days (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/philippines/entry-requirements)
